description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9 Docker image with a cache on node_modules/ and a before_script that runs npm install gitbook-cli -g, gitbook fetch latest, and gitbook install. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job named test in the test stage that executes gitbook build . public, runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job named pages in the deploy stage that also runs gitbook build . public, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact expiring in one week, and only runs on the master branch.
